visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a refrigerated display at Costco, filled with vacuum-packed meat. A prominent 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is overlayed at the top of the frame. The lighting is bright and clinical, typical of a warehouse store. (2) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black dress with a chest cutout and large earrings, stands in the store aisle. She holds a smartphone and speaks enthusiastically, gesturing towards the meat. In the background, other shoppers and grocery carts are visible in the wide, bright aisle. (3) The camera zooms in on the product, 'Low-salt boneless duck legs'. The packaging features a duck logo and Chinese text. The woman's hands are seen holding the double-pack, pointing out the flat, clean skin and vacuum seal. (4) The setting transitions to a modern indoor kitchen. Two raw duck legs are placed on a wire rack. A hand applies seasonings, including black pepper, salt, and garlic powder. A clear spice grinder with Sichuan peppercorns is used to add flavor. (5) Close-up shot of the duck legs frying skin-side down in a stainless steel skillet. The meat sizzles as the skin browns into a golden-brown, crispy texture. Wisps of steam and bubbling fat are visible, highlighting the cooking process. (6) A knife slices through the cooked duck leg on a black cutting board, revealing succulent, pinkish-brown meat. The woman appears again, holding a small plate with a piece of meat and a slice of bread, showing an expression of pure delight. (7) The woman is seated at a table with a complete plate of sliced duck. She holds a piece up to the camera with her fingers, demonstrating its flexibility and texture. The background shows a cozy home interior with shelves and plush toys.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 妹妹. (2) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 新的肉!. [Slogan]: 新的肉!. (3) [Subtitle]: 什麼. (4) [Subtitle]: 我想要這個. [Slogan]: 料理超簡單 薄鹽去骨鴨腿. (5) [Subtitle]: 它已經去好骨了 剩下料理了 剩下料理就交給你了. (6) [Subtitle]: 最難的就是料理 嗯 那你一定做得到 我們來試試看 這個薄鹽鴨腿值不值得來挑個肉肉. (7) [Subtitle]: 其實銷量蠻好的 因為你看旁邊的雞滿滿的. (8) [Subtitle]: 這看起來很不錯 因為它的皮很平整 看起來很治愈. (9) [Subtitle]: 好! 回去吃看看 757 我來吃你來做. [Slogan]: 我來吃+1 你來做+1. (10) [Subtitle]: 妹妹加了胡椒 鹽巴 香蒜粉以及花椒 這個是因為我喜歡花椒的味道. (11) [Subtitle]: 就是我們剛剛在煎鴨腿 然後鴨腿不是會噴出很多油嗎 鴨油 因為有些人麵包會沾橄欖油 我發現鴨油更香哎 就是哦~ 好好吃哦 這麵包就是百搭. [Variety]: 好好吃哦. (12) [Subtitle]: 好市多薄鹽鴨腿真空袋 它幫你去過骨 所以你直接煮好之後你直接切 超方便 有沒有看到 它這完全去骨 它就留這個邊緣一點點腿骨 很方便. [Slogan]: 薄鹽鴨腿真空袋. (13) [Subtitle]: 然后它的鸭油呢 非常的多 所以我觉得也可以拿来做咖哩 因为它只要煎一块的那个鸭油 几乎可以让你再炒四道菜 就是非常的油嫩又香 然后吃起来非常的Q弹 因为它有用小苏打帮你腌过 1-10分呢 我们给它9分 因为它真的是包装的太贴心 处理的也干净 所以如果有在家下厨的人可以买哟. [Slogan]: 再炒四道菜. [Variety]: 油嫩又香. [Slogan]: 非常的Q彈. [Variety]: 我們給它9分.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, approximately 3 shoppers visible in the background aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long straight dark hair, wearing a stylish black midi dress with a distinctive chest cutout and a silver chain necklace holding her phone. She wears large, statement earrings.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts in a bright, spacious Costco warehouse with metal shelving and refrigeration units. It then moves to a clean, modern kitchen with a stainless steel cooktop and finally to a residential dining/living area with warm lighting and home decor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and high-tempo electronic pop BGM begins immediately. A female voice speaks with high energy and a bright tone: 'Meme, new meat!'. Background noise is minimal, with just a hint of store atmosphere. (2) A sharp 'ding' SFX punctuates the transition as the woman begins her detailed find. Her speech rate is rapid and enthusiastic, with clear articulation and high pitch variability. (3) The acoustic texture changes to include the sizzling sound of meat in a pan, providing a crisp, white-noise layer under the voice. The BGM remains consistent in the background. (4) Percussive sounds of a knife against a cutting board are heard during the slicing scene, adding a realistic tactile layer to the mix. The vocal tone becomes more descriptive. (5) The final phase features a seated review. The voice is steady and authoritative yet friendly. The BGM continues as a cheerful bed until the end, concluding with an emphasized numeric score.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Showcase -> Demonstration -> Tasting/Review -> Final Verdict.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote and review a specific meat product found at Costco: Low-salt boneless duck legs. It uses an enthusiastic personal vlog style to show the ease of purchase, the simplicity of preparation, and the high quality of the taste, ultimately encouraging viewers to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features a permanent Costco logo, specifically mentions shopping at Costco, and provides a detailed review/rating of a Costco-exclusive product.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The high production value of the social media-style editing (subtitles, variety-style graphics) and the energetic female host make this highly effective for short-form video engagement.
